scenarios.description: Audit a small monorepo without changing it, honor root preferences, and preserve negative findings.
scenarios.request: Use $agent-readiness-scoring to perform a read-only audit of this repository. Produce an evidence-backed assessment and do not modify or commit anything.

files.README.md:
# Acme Signals

Run the API with `python3 backend/app.py`. The dashboard is static.
files.AGENT_READINESS_PREFERENCES.md:
# Agent Readiness Preferences

- GitHub Actions workflows are approved.
- Never claim paid code review exists without live evidence.
files.backend/schema.sql: create table events (id integer primary key);

scenarios.description: Distinguish approved local and CI work from paid accounts, invasive instrumentation, and score-only changes.
scenarios.request: Use $agent-readiness-scoring to plan the next readiness improvements. Classify each candidate action as autonomous, approval_required, or rejected, following repository preferences.

files.AGENT_READINESS_PREFERENCES.md:
# Agent Readiness Preferences

GitHub Actions and local validation tooling may be added autonomously. New accounts, spending, production connections, and broad tracing instrumentation require approval. Never add score-only stubs.
